series_metadata.series_description: These data generated audit printouts indicate transfers (corrections)of revenues that were erroneously assigned to counties, taxing districts and townships.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report completed and released, then destroy 5 years thereafter ; Electronic: Information is also retained in Tax Distribution Data Base Computer System for three years after the audit is released., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
